_comment: Expected output from hpa_burst experiment. HPA target CPU=40% on a 1-replica deployment. Burst at 200 concurrency should trigger scale-up within 60-90s (k8s default HPA sync period is 15s). ASS < 0.05 = stable.

_interpretation.ass: ASS=0.0095 — 4 events in 420s. Stable autoscaling. No flapping observed.
_interpretation.scale_up_latency: First scale-up triggered at ~75s after burst start. HPA sync period 15s + pod startup ~45s.
_interpretation.p99_note: P99 spike (720ms) during scale-up window before new replicas became ready.
